visualizerParams.title: Recursive Bitwise Addition Carry Bug
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The recursive bitwise addition is failing to produce the correct sum. It seems the carry bit is not being shifted correctly. Identify and fix the logic flaw.

solution.explanation: In bitwise addition, the carry bits from the current position must be added to the NEXT (higher) position. This requires a left shift (`<< 1`). The buggy code incorrectly used a right shift (`>> 1`).
